message:
✨ Add eager progressive mounting for off-screen dashboard cards (#243)

Cards below the fold now progressively mount in the background ~2s after
initial page load, staggered at 100ms intervals. This ensures card data
is already fetched and ready when the user scrolls down, eliminating the
jumpy skeleton-to-content transition.

Visible cards still mount first via IntersectionObserver (unchanged).
The eager mount queue resets on page navigation so each dashboard page
gets its own progressive loading cycle.

Applies to all dashboards since CardWrapper's useLazyMount is shared.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
